师资队伍

  • 教师名录

  • 院士学者

  • 国家级人才

  • 退休教师

  • 人才招聘

    • 教师名录

    董明凯
    副研究员

    邮箱：mingkaidong@sjtu.edu.cn

    所在研究所：并行与分布式系统研究所

    个人主页：https://dong.mk

    个人简介

    上海交通大学并行与分布式系统研究所（IPADS）副研究员，分别于2015年和2021年获得上海交通大学学士和博士学位。主要研究方向为操作系统、文件与存储系统、DNA存储与计算，相关工作发表在FAST、USENIX ATC、SOSP等操作系统顶级国际会议。曾获SOSP2023最佳论文奖、2022年华为“火花奖”、英特尔中国学术英才计划2022年度荣誉学者、2020年华为奥林帕斯先锋奖。其研制的高性能持久内存文件系统SoupFS进入OpenEuler操作系统创新版；与华为合作的EROFS成为首个合入Linux内核主线的国人自主研发的文件系统，并已经成为Android系统分区的官方文件系统，运行在亿级智能手机之中。


    更多信息请见 https://dong.mk


    教育背景

    2011.09 - 2015.06    上海交通大学 软件工程 学士

    2015.09 - 2021.06    上海交通大学 计算机科学与技术 博士

    工作履历

    2021.08 - 2024.12    上海交通大学 电子信息与电气工程学院 助理研究员

    2025.01 - 至今    上海交通大学 计算机学院 副研究员


    教授课程

    本科生课程

    • SE127/SE1301 软件基础实践 (2019-2025)

    • SE232/SE2322 高级数据结构 (2020-2025 春季)

    • CS3601 操作系统 (2024-2025 秋季)

    • CS1501 程序设计思想与方法 (2021-2023 秋季)

    研究生课程

    • EI6711 高级操作系统 (2022-2025 春季)

    论文发表

    EuroSys '26

    SwitchFS: Asynchronous Metadata Updates for Distributed Filesystems with In-Network Coordination. Jingwei Xu, Mingkai Dong, Qiulin Tian, Ziyi Tian, Tong Xin and Haibo Chen. In Proceedings of the 21th European Conference on Computer Systems (EuroSys '26), Edinburgh, UK, April, 2026.

    NSDI '26

    FalconFS: Distributed File System for Large-Scale Deep Learning Pipeline. Jingwei Xu, Junbin Kang, Mingkai Dong, Mingyu Liu, Lu Zhang, Shaohong Guo, Ziyan Qiu, Mingzhen You, Ziyi Tian, Anqi Yu, Tianhong Ding, Xinwei Hu, and Haibo Chen. In Proceedings of the 23rd USENIX Symposium on Networked Systems Design and Implementation (NSDI '26), Renton, WA, USA, May 4–6, 2026.

    FAST '25

    Liquid-State Drive: A Case for DNA Block Device for Enormous Data. Jiahao Zhou, Mingkai Dong, Fei Wang, Jingyao Zeng, Lei Zhao, Chunhai Fan, Haibo Chen. In Proceedings of the 23rd USENIX Conference on File and Storage Technologies (FAST '25), Santa Clara, CA, US, February, 2025.

    OSDI '24

    Using Dynamically Layered Definite Releases for Verifying the RefFS File System. Mo Zou, Dong Du, Mingkai Dong, Haibo Chen.In Proceedings of the 18th USENIX Symposium on Operating Systems Design and Implementation (OSDI '24), Santa Clara, CA, US, July, 2024.

    SOSP '23Best Paper Award!

    TreeSLS: A Tree-structured Microkernel with Efficient Whole-system Persistence on NVM. Best Paper Award! Fangnuo Wu, Mingkai Dong, Gequan Mo, Haibo Chen. In Proceedings of the 29th ACM Symposium on Operating Systems Principles (SOSP '23), Koblenz, Germany, Octobar 23-26, 2023.

    Nature

    DNA-based programmable gate arrays for general-purpose DNA computing. Hui Lv, Nuli Xie, Mingqiang Li, Mingkai Dong, Chenyun Sun, Qian Zhang, Lei Zhao, Jiang Li, Xiaolei Zuo, Haibo Chen, Fei Wang, Chunhai Fan. Nature (2023).

    FAST '22

    HTMFS: Strong Consistency Comes for Free with Hardware Transactional Memory in Persistent Memory File Systems. Jifei Yi, Mingkai Dong, Fangnuo Wu, Haibo Chen. In the 20th USENIX Conference on File and Storage Technologies (FAST '22), Santa Clara, CA, USA, February 22-24, 2022.

    FAST '22

    MT^2: Memory bandwidth Regulation on Hybrid NVM/DRAM Platforms. Jifei Yi, Benchao Dong, Mingkai Dong, Ruizhe Tong, Haibo Chen. In the 20th USENIX Conference on File and Storage Technologies (FAST '22), Santa Clara, CA, USA, February 22-24, 2022.

    APSys '20

    On the Precision of Precise Event Based Sampling. Jifei Yi, Benchao Dong, Mingkai Dong, Haibo Chen. In Proceedings of the 11th Asia-Pacific Workshop on Systems (APSys '20), Tsukuba, Japan, August 2020.

    SOSP '19

    Performance and Protection in the ZoFS User-space NVM File System. Mingkai Dong, Heng Bu, Jifei Yi, Benchao Dong, Haibo Chen. In Proceedings of the 27th ACM Symposium on Operating Systems Principles (SOSP '19), Ontario, Canada, October 2019.

    ATC '19

    EROFS: A Compression-friendly Readonly File System for Resource-scarce Device. Xiang Gao, Mingkai Dong, Xie Miao, Wei Du, Chao Yu, Haibo Chen. In Proceedings of the 2019 USENIX Annual Technical Conference (USENIX ATC '19), Renton, WA, USA, July 2019.

    ATC '17

    Soft Updates Made Simple and Fast for Non-volatile Memories. Mingkai Dong, Haibo Chen. In Proceedings of the 2017 USENIX Annual Technical Conference (USENIX ATC '17), Santa Clara, CA, USA, July 2017.

    ToS

    Efficient and Available In-memory KV-Store with Hybrid Erasure Coding and Replication. Haibo Chen, Heng Zhang, Mingkai Dong, Zhaoguo Wang, Yubin Xia, Haibing Guan and Binyu Zang. ACM Transactions on Storage, 2017.

    APSys '16

    Rethinking Benchmarking for NVM-based File Systems. Mingkai Dong, Qianqian Yu, Xiaozhou Zhou, Yang Hong, Haibo Chen and Binyu Zang. In Proceedings of the 7th Asia-Pacific Workshop on Systems (APSys '16), Hong Kong, China, August 2016.

    FAST '16

    Efficient and Available In-memory KV-Store with Hybrid Erasure Coding and Replication. Heng Zhang, Mingkai Dong, Haibo Chen. In Proceedings of the 14th USENIX Conference on File and Storage Technologies (FAST '16), Santa Clara, CA, USA, February 2016.

    CAL

    Persistent Transactional Memory. Zhaoguo Wang, Han Yi, Ran Liu, Mingkai Dong and Haibo Chen. IEEE Computer Architecture Letters, 2015.


    获奖信息

    SOSP2023最佳论文奖、2022年华为“火花奖”、英特尔中国学术英才计划2022年度荣誉学者、2020年华为奥林帕斯先锋奖

    学术服务

    担任 OSDI(2025)、FAST(2025,2026)、ASPLOS(2025,2026)、NSDI(2025) 程序委员会委员

    公众号二维码

    小红书二维码

    哔哩哔哩二维码

    学院地址：上海市东川路800号

    Email：scs@sjtu.edu.cn

    邮政编码：200240
